arts.ttl: Barcelona on alert as Celta Vigo prepare for Oscar Mingueza exit
arts.sum: Former Barcelona defender Oscar Mingueza has regularly been linked with a move away from Celta Vigo, and it could happen as early as this month. According to Relevo, there are multiple teams in the Premier League that are willing to pay Mingueza’s release clause, which is valued at €20m. Because of this, Celta have started […] The post Barcelona on alert as Celta Vigo prepare for Oscar Mingueza exit appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barca's Olmo granted temporary permission to play
arts.sum: Forwards Dani Olmo and Pau Victor will be allowed to play for Barcelona after the club was granted provisional permission to register the pair by the Spanish national sports council (CSD).

arts.ttl: Barcelona star benched vs Athletic Club as punishment by Hansi Flick
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick opted to drop a member of his first-choice XI to the bench as an act of punishment this evening. Barcelona are of course currently locked…

arts.ttl: Official: Barcelona receive green light to register Dani Olmo & Pau Víctor
arts.sum: La Liga giants Barcelona have on Wednesday at long last secured the go-ahead to register Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor, on a provisional basis. The ongoing developments behind the scenes…

arts.ttl: Barca granted temporary permission to register Olmo & Victor
arts.sum: Barcelona have been granted temporary permission to register Dani Olmo and Pau Victor by the Spanish government after appealing to the Consejo Superior de Deportes (CSD). Comunicado Oficial | El CSD estima la medida cautelar urgente solicitada por el FC Barcelona y por los jugadores Dani Olmo y Pau Víctor.

arts.ttl: Revealed: the reason why Dani Olmo was cleared to play for Barcelona
arts.sum: FC Barcelona players Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor have been given the green light to play for the club after a Spanish court ruled against the decision from LaLiga and the Royal Spanish Football Federation (RFEF) to not allow them to be re-registered. However, LaLiga did not ratify the deal and allow the attacker to be registered as an active playing member of the squad as the numbers did not fit within their salary limit rules, which are directly related to the money that comes into the club.

arts.ttl: Barça's Olmo, Víctor given temporary registration
arts.sum: Dani Olmo and Pau Víctor have been granted temporary playing registrations as Spain's top sports court continues to analyse Barcelona's case against LaLiga and the Spanish Football Federation [RFEF].

arts.ttl: Arsenal readying January bid for Barcelona star
arts.sum: The race for the signature of Barcelona star Ronald Araújo is beginning to heat up. This comes amid confirmation that another of the continent’s leading clubs have placed the Uruguayan…

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal addresses Barcelona future with wonderkid's contract due to expire next summer
arts.sum: Teenage superstar Lamine Yamal confirms that he will soon sign a new contract at Barcelona, with his existing terms due to expire in June 2026.

arts.ttl: Barcelona granted temporary permission to register Dani Olmo after lodging an appeal - but the star is not named in their Super Cup semi-final squad
arts.sum: Olmo and Victor have been included in Barcelona's Super Cup squad, but the pair were not named in the starting line-up or among the substitutes for their semi-final with Athletic Club.
